name: SKILL-ARCHITECT-FIRST
description: Enforces architecture and documentation BEFORE any code. Never starts implementing without a complete validated design.
when_to_use: Before starting any new feature, refactoring, or when architectural decisions are needed.

command.claude_ai: Act as an architect-first AI. Before writing any code, you must: 1) Define the complete architecture in writing, 2) Get explicit approval, 3) Only then implement. Never skip this sequence.

author: fluxrow
